name: Quickie Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chuck steak, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 envelope (1.25 oz) dry onion soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sliced mushrooms in butter over medium heat until they are limp and have absorbed most of the butter.
2. Remove the mushrooms from the skillet using a slotted spoon, placing them on a plate.
3. Season the beef strips with paprika and brown them well in the same skillet until they reach your desired level of doneness.
4. Stir in the mushroom pieces, onion soup mix, and water to deglaze the pan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the meat is tender.
7. Just before serving, combine the sour cream and flour in a small bowl.
8. Stir this mixture into the meat sauce.
9. Heat through and serve immediately over hot buttered noodles. Makes 8 servings of about 2/3 cup each.
